name: Between Seat Storage - Brightroom™: Automotive Organizer, Black, Car Accessories, 1 Year Warranty
description:
Utilize the space between your car seats for storage with the Between-Seat Storage from Brightroom™. This black seat storage features multiple divided compartments to help provide enough space for your snacks, chapstick and other items you want to keep close at hand. Made with soft and lightweight fabric, this organizer boasts an adjustable design to fit well between the seats in any vehicle.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
